title: Tag or connect contact(s) in task or project

Description
Ability to tag/connect a contact from our database in a task/project so we can reference who the POC from that partner or lead or customer is.

posts.author: Miracleadmin (Lorin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to tag/connect a contact from our database in a task/project so we can reference who the POC from that partner or lead or customer is.

What are you trying to achieve

Easy connection between CRM and tasks/projects so we don’t have to switch boards so many times.
